title: Post-mortem: hooks_runner race on async post_wiki_edit
summary: post_wiki_edit fired gen-index.py twice concurrently after a batch wiki edit, corrupting wiki-overview.md mid-write. Root cause: missing lock file. Fixed by an flock guard.
root_cause: post_wiki_edit.py spawned gen-index.py without a mutex; two near-simultaneous wiki writes raced on the same output file.

timeline.event: Batch edit of 6 wiki pages committed
post_wiki_edit hook fired twice (one per Write tool call)
wiki-overview.md left half-written; SessionStart read stale stats

findings.title: No mutex around gen-index spawn
findings.detail: Concurrent invocations both write wiki/context/wiki-overview.md with no lock.

findings.title: Non-atomic write of overview file
findings.detail: Writes directly to target path instead of temp+rename.

findings.title: Hook logs nothing on spawn
findings.detail: No breadcrumb makes races invisible in post-mortem.

action_items: Add a test that fires the hook twice concurrently
